codeReview.summary: Most shell init/install behavior matches the contract, but init shell detection misses a required fallback path from the Ruby reference implementation.

issues.description: `cmd_init` relies on `detect_shell_for_init()`, which only checks `$SHELL` for fish and otherwise defaults to Bash. In the reference behavior (`/Users/js/code/3rd/try/try.rb`, `fish?` at lines 1505-1509), init shell detection falls back to the parent process name when `$SHELL` is empty. This causes `lab init` to emit a bash snippet instead of fish when run from fish with `SHELL` unset.

summary: Fail: one blocking correctness issue found in `lab init` shell detection fallback behavior.
